title: lapack bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.9.0-13]
- Add explicit requires to the devel subpackages
- Note: the the cblas64 seems to be linked against the libblas (not the 64 version)
- this is not a regression, however in the Fedora it uses libblas64 instead.
- Resolves: RHEL-5768

[3.9.0-12]
- Spec file cleanup
- Remove unused patches
  Related: RHEL-5770

[3.9.0-11]
- Fix soname of the 64-bit version libraries
  Resolves: RHEL-24851
full_text:
[3.9.0-13]
- Add explicit requires to the devel subpackages
- Note: the the cblas64 seems to be linked against the libblas (not the 64 version)
- this is not a regression, however in the Fedora it uses libblas64 instead.
- Resolves: RHEL-5768

[3.9.0-12]
- Spec file cleanup
- Remove unused patches
  Related: RHEL-5770

[3.9.0-11]
- Fix soname of the 64-bit version libraries
  Resolves: RHEL-24851

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20848.html
